command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

echo '=== CREATE CLEAN BRANCH FROM GITEA MAIN ==='
git fetch origin
git checkout -b amendment-A-clean origin/main

echo '=== APPLY FILES DIRECTLY ==='
cp /tmp/constitution_v1_1.md constitution/01_Moreno_AI_Constitution.md
cp /tmp/article_A_vision.md   articles/0A_Article_Ecosystem_Vision.md

git config user.email "claude@moreno-ai" 2>/dev/null || true
git config user.name  "Claude (ecosystem session)" 2>/dev/null || true
git add constitution/01_Moreno_AI_Constitution.md articles/0A_Article_Ecosystem_Vision.md
git commit -m "governance: Amendment A — ecosystem vision, multi-agent modes, transport independence

Approved by Jose Moreno on 2026-06-25.
Rollback tag: pre-amendment-A-rollback (8ca6acb)

- constitution/01_Moreno_AI_Constitution.md: v1.0 -> v1.1
- articles/0A_Article_Ecosystem_Vision.md: new"

echo '=== PUSH AS main ==='
git push origin amendment-A-clean:main 2>&1

echo '=== TAG THE PUSH ==='
git tag -f constitution-v1.1-amendment-A HEAD
git push origin constitution-v1.1-amendment-A --force 2>&1

echo '=== VERIFY GITEA ==='
git fetch origin
git log origin/main --oneline -4

echo '=== CONFIRM FILES ON GITEA ==='
git show origin/main:constitution/01_Moreno_AI_Constitution.md | head -6
git show origin/main:articles/0A_Article_Ecosystem_Vision.md | head -4

echo DONE_1908
